name: Password (Context-Anchored)
summary: Detects passwords by keyword context in prose (e.g., 'password: Tr!cky$and2025')
description: Detects passwords by keyword proximity in prose / label-value text. Matches values following password-related labels such as 'password:', 'passwd:', 'pwd:', 'passcode:'. Skips markdown asterisks and surrounding quotes when locating the value, enforces a 4-character minimum, and uses reject_keywords to suppress false positives on instructional text ('password reset link', 'password policy', etc.). For JSON-structured passwords see credentials.password_context_json.

effect.message: Password redacted — detected by keyword context
